BL-509 — Approval Amend button lets the human steer the ticket: prompt for the change, mark it human_approval: amending, route the steer to the specifier, who revises and re-presents it (EPIC, 3 slices)
What it solves: WHAT AMEND DOES TODAY (verified read-only 2026-07-17, two investigations):
  - Tapping Amend (topicRouter.ts approvalRequestedButtons; callback amend:<id>) silently stashes a
    pending-button marker in .swarmforge/operator/telegram-pending-button-actions.json and sends the
    human NO prompt (de…
Approval context: Your ask 2026-07-17: "the amend button should enable me to steer the ticket." I investigated and found Amend today does almost nothing useful — it silently files your note to an operator queue, leaves the ticket 'pending', and the note is consumed as an approval answer that never reaches the specif…
BL-509 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-509" (or "reject BL-509 <reason>") to act.
